title: The Posterior, Built Up
tagline: Prior × likelihood = posterior — eight live experiments that turn Bayesian inference from a formula into a feel
summary: Drag a Gaussian prior, click data points onto an axis, and watch the posterior crystallize. Then go conjugate (Beta-Binomial coin), separate posterior predictive from a MAP plug-in, race grid evaluation against MCMC against variational inference on a non-conjugate posterior, and finish with Bayesian linear regression whose uncertainty band bows out away from data — every number computed live in pure JS.
highlights: Drag a Gaussian prior, click data, watch the posterior shrink and shift live.
Toggle prior strength vs sample size on a real Beta-Binomial coin and see when data wins.
Compare a MAP plug-in's narrow predictive distribution to the full posterior predictive — the gap is the cost of ignoring uncertainty.
Race grid evaluation, Metropolis MCMC and a Gaussian variational fit on a non-conjugate, multimodal posterior.
Bayesian linear regression with uncertainty bands that bow out exactly where data is missing — the real reason GPs feel honest.
